General.Name: Kaisa Group Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Kaisa Group Holdings Ltd., an investment holding company, engages in the property development, investment, and management businesses in the People's Republic of China. It is also involved in the hotel and catering, and cultural center operations, as well as rental, leasing, and sale of properties. In addition, the company engages in tourism and holiday projects; high-speed passenger transportation, ocean cargo transportation, and coastal tourism services; and commercial asset operations. Further, it offers preschool education and K12 education, community education, and online education services. Additionally, the company provides pharmaceutical products; professional medical services for sports enthusiasts, orthopedic patients, postoperative populations, and sub-healthy individuals; and dental equipment. Kaisa Group Holdings Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
